title: Moroccan Smoky Kefta Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful Moroccan-inspired dish made with smoky kefta, sweet butternut squash, and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Moroccan Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most middle eastern grocery stores

instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add kefta and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add butternut squash, Moroccan spice blend, salt, and pepper.
Cover the tagine and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the squash is tender.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
Serve hot over couscous or rice.
